hooks.command: [ -f .claude/skills/mondial/cronjobs.json ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Mondial project: session-only cron jobs (daily bet-revision check + reminders) die with each session. Compare CronList against .claude/skills/mondial/cronjobs.json and offer to restore any missing job via CronCreate with the stored cron/recurring/prompt. Skip one-shots whose date passed; recurring jobs expire 7 days after their createdAt."}}\n' || true
